creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Steve Wills from comment #11)
>   5 PORTREVISION=   20180425
> 
> Doesn't look correct to me.

Oh because it doesn't have a official release (yet, but will it?) so I added a date PORTREVISION for future updating need.  But on second thought that this is not really required and we can just add PORTREVISION= 1 if there is a real "0.2" release.

Hung-Yi, can you check this program acts as expected?
